description: Side panel toolbox for the workflow designer providing buttons to add initial, intermediate, and final states, delete selected elements, and zoom in/out/fit-to-view controls.

examples.title: Toolbox alongside designer canvas
examples.code: <TmWorkflowToolbox OnAddState="@HandleAddState" OnDeleteSelected="@HandleDelete" HasSelection="@(_selectedState is not null)" ZoomLevel="@_zoomLevel" OnZoomChanged="@(z => _zoomLevel = z)" OnFitToView="@HandleFitToView" />
